ExpeditionSeed.description: A /data/expeditions seed file: versioned envelope (DC5) + DC4 value metadata.

content_id.description: Version-pinned content id (brief §3) — recorded on every ActiveExpedition prepared from it.

supply_set.description: Supplies withdrawn from the Harbor at preparation; refunded exactly on cancellation (OPS1).

overflow_cap_multiplier.description: Unsafe Overflow cap = this × the current Safe capacity S, per resource (brief §2.12).

ExpeditionContent.description: The A4 expedition content payload (DC4 metadata covers every numeric leaf under here).

legs.description: Number of legs — a deterministic descriptive property, not a traversal graph.

ExpeditionRoute.description: The single short deterministic route (brief §2.5). Not the World Atlas graph (W-suite FUTURE BUILD).

condition.description: Fixed literal: the outpost is damaged (the non-combat stabilization target).

OutpostSpec.description: The one damaged route-anchor outpost destination (brief §2.7).

ResourceAmounts.description: A partial per-CoreResource amount map (DC6: CoreResource keys only — never Merit/receipt metrics).

forced_withdrawal.description: Forced withdrawal recovers nothing by default (may be 0).

OutcomeSalvageTotals.description: Per-outcome salvage TOTAL (units). Shared across all Guardians — equal magnitude (brief §4).

GuardianSalvageComposition.description: Which CoreResource each starting Guardian's equal-total salvage arrives as (brief §4).

CoreResource.description: The four storable, spendable, cap-bound resources (Doc 07 §2, D26). Storage, exposed surplus, cargo, and raid loss type against CoreResource ONLY (DC6) — never StandingResource or ReceiptMetric.

OutcomeReadinessMap.description: Readiness produced by each at-outpost outcome.

OutcomeReadiness.description: Vessel/crew/Guardian condition produced by one outcome (brief §2.15 bounded recovery).

ReadinessCondition.description: Condition of the vessel / crew / Guardian after an outcome (brief §2.15 bounded recovery).

OutpostEventSpec.description: The bounded at-outpost event spec (EVT1–EVT4 reuse, brief §2.6). The sim builds a schema-shaped `Event` from these values; `min_provisions_to_begin` is the seeded threshold of a real EVT4 observable trigger (harbor Provisions ≥ threshold) — the only way the outpost objective becomes eligible.

SeedValueMetadata.description: DC4 unit-requirement metadata for one numeric seed value. `path` is the dot-path of the numeric field under the seed's payload root (`kit` for guardian seeds, `storage` for resource-storage seeds); the validator enforces that every numeric leaf has exactly one entry and every entry resolves to a numeric leaf.

Unit.description: Value-cadence vocabulary for seed metadata (Doc 07 §2 / §1.2, DC4).

$comment: GENERATED from src/contracts/expedition-seed.ts (D39) — do not edit by hand; run `pnpm run schema:generate`.
